# DevAITools.com

> AI tools, APIs, and development resources for software engineers — reviews, tutorials, and practical guides on integrating AI into development workflows.

DevAITools.com is an independent resource covering AI development tools, APIs, coding assistants, MCP servers, prompt engineering, and practical guides for software engineers integrating AI into their workflows.

## Content Focus
- AI coding assistants (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Windsurf)
- LLM APIs and SDKs (Claude API, OpenAI, Gemini, open-source models)
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) development and servers
- AI testing and evaluation frameworks
- Prompt engineering patterns and best practices
- AI-powered DevOps and CI/CD tools
- Code review and quality tools with AI

## Key Articles
- [Best AI Coding Tools 2026](https://devaitools.com/blog/best-ai-coding-tools-2026/): Comprehensive comparison of AI coding assistants
- [Claude API Tutorial](https://devaitools.com/blog/claude-api-tutorial/): Getting started with the Anthropic Claude API
- [Building AI Agents](https://devaitools.com/blog/building-ai-agents/): Practical guide to autonomous AI agent development
- [AI Code Review Tools](https://devaitools.com/blog/ai-code-review-tools/): Best tools for AI-assisted code review

## Editorial Process
AI-assisted research and drafting with quality checks and human review.
Learn more: https://devaitools.com/editorial-process

## Publisher
Website: https://devaitools.com
